textByHash.14192e332da0049a88af522df5828df246e57e03: My name is Twiggy O'Korn and I am the Mistress of all of the Achievement Diaries. It is a pleasure to make your acquaintance.
textByHash.47057c29dc49cbcf5d5301496cb0b34cd3611ac7: You can, but you'll need to free up some space to hold the cape and hood.
textByHash.5768ceea10a1d9be4a63b501a7f033f0d854db7e: You don't appear to have enough space in your inventory, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.766443965b63672ede833b59df1c5727d5199168: I don't think you can afford one at the moment. They cost 99,000 coins.
textByHash.8de7b8b6f43b2b7b7bac516c8a1fc6270bd61326: Ah yes, this is a Cape of Accomplishment, available only to those who complete every single Achievement Diary.
textByHash.a2c20a46e0f8d45ce3ac650ae1fe165090c26f61: That's not a problem. I'll give you another one.
textByHash.aae21bded13b996aee5b51a9098d1f1f458a6ae7: I see you've completed all the Achievement Diaries - well done! However, the capes cost 99,000 coins.
textByHash.b88c6b17fbabdfd6dab6d6299c231d3478c7fc86: I see you've completed all the Achievement Diaries - well done! Now, I'll need 99,000 coins to cover my costs.
textByHash.d616c3bf8bc2a1177fd52e03bf1d8c2cc262d025: I see you've completed all the Achievement Diaries - well done! However, you'll need to free up some space to hold the cape and hood.
textByHash.e50394d3dd96804e994cefe9bc8bf63440de36d5: Squirrel food, mostly. It's not like it grows on trees, you know! Anyway, do you want the cape?
textByHash.ea0d37a66be6a5131fcdccbf08aefcb958f3a655: It'll cost you another 99,000 coins. You do realise you already own a cape and hood, right?
textByHash.feb1b32de4c421fc949a6038c64e2a0dcdbdd4a3: Most certainly, and free of charge!
